name: Saving Digital Circus
description: Saving Digital Circus is a 2D archery game with lovely graphics. tap archer is free bow and arrow arcade game. Shoot arrow to cut the Gibbets rope to save Digital Circus from dying. While hanging on gibbets the health of hangman decreases continually.
instructions: Shoot arrow to cut the Gibbets rope to save hangman from dying
tags: Arcade, digital circus, Hot, New, Shoot, Shooter, Shooting
